guide.title: How It Works
guide.subtitle: Employee guide to the Methna Admin Panel
guide.welcome: Welcome to the Methna Admin Panel
guide.welcomeDesc: This guide will help you understand how to use the admin panel effectively. Read through each section to learn about the tools available to you.
guide.gettingStartedDesc: After logging in with your admin credentials, you'll see the Dashboard. The sidebar on the left gives you access to all management sections.
guide.dashboardDesc: The Dashboard provides a real-time overview of your platform's health: total users, active matches, pending reports, and revenue metrics. Use the Analytics page for deeper insights into user behavior, conversion rates, and retention cohorts.
guide.userMgmtDesc: Navigate to Users to view, search, and manage all registered users. Click any user to see their full profile, edit details, view activity logs, moderate photos, and manage their verification status. You can ban, suspend, or delete users from their detail page.
guide.userMgmtTip1: Use the search bar to quickly find users by name or email
guide.userMgmtTip2: Filter users by status, role, or subscription plan
guide.userMgmtTip3: Check the Trust Score to assess user reliability
guide.userMgmtTip4: Use 'Detect Suspicious' to run automated behavior analysis
guide.contentModDesc: The Content Moderation section includes Photo Moderation and Verification. Review uploaded photos for inappropriate content, and verify user selfies and identity documents.
guide.contentModTip1: Approve or reject photos with optional moderation notes
guide.contentModTip2: Selfie verification compares submitted selfies with profile photos
guide.contentModTip3: Pending items are shown as badges in the sidebar
guide.reportsDesc: Users can report each other for various reasons (fake profile, harassment, scam, spam). Review each report, take action, and leave moderator notes. The Trust & Safety section lets you detect suspicious behavior patterns and review auto-flagged content.
guide.reportsTip1: Resolve reports promptly to maintain user trust
guide.reportsTip2: Use shadow banning for subtle moderation without alerting the user
guide.reportsTip3: Check the confidence score on auto-detected flags
guide.chatDesc: Monitor conversations between users to ensure compliance with community guidelines. You can view messages, mute conversations, and manage notifications. Send push notifications to individual users or broadcast to all users.
guide.revenueDesc: Track subscription plans (Free, Premium, Gold), view active subscribers, manage profile boosts, and monitor ad campaigns. The monetization page shows conversion funnels and revenue metrics.
guide.securityDesc: Manage email domain blacklists to block disposable email providers. View audit logs to track all administrative actions for accountability. Security settings show JWT expiry and rate limiting configurations.
guide.securityTip1: Regularly review audit logs for unauthorized actions
guide.securityTip2: Add known disposable email domains to the blacklist
guide.securityTip3: Monitor login patterns for suspicious admin access
guide.rolesDesc: The admin panel supports two roles:
guide.adminRoleDesc: Full access to all features including user deletion, security settings, and audit logs
guide.moderatorRoleDesc: Access to content moderation, reports, support tickets, and user management (no deletion)
guide.bestPractice1: Always leave detailed moderator notes when resolving reports
guide.bestPractice2: Review pending photos and verifications daily
guide.bestPractice3: Check the dashboard at the start of each shift
guide.bestPractice4: Use the audit log to track team actions
guide.bestPractice7: When in doubt about a moderation decision, escalate to a senior admin
guide.needHelpDesc: If you encounter any issues or have questions about the admin panel, contact the development team or your supervisor.
